headline: Circle Internet stock falls on new stablecoin venture report
summary: Investing.com -- Circle Internet shares fell 5% Tuesday morning after Bloomberg reported that Visa, Stripe and more than 100 other financial firms are joining forces to launch a new stablecoin venture.

headline: Securitize Lists on NYSE as SECZ: Backed by $400M Raise and BlackRock BUIDL
summary: Securitize will begin trading on the New York Stock Exchange on July 2, 2026 under ticker symbol SECZ, following shareholder approval of its merger with Cantor Equity Partners II on June 29. The deal raises approximately $400 million at a $1.25 billion pre-money valuation, making Securitize the first pure-play tokenization ...

headline: BlackRock turns cautious on emerging markets, upgrades euro bonds
summary: Investing.com -- BlackRock Inc. has downgraded its view on emerging-market equities to neutral from overweight for the next six to 12 months, citing concentration risks in artificial intelligence-linked companies, according to its 2026 mid-year global investment outlook released by the BlackRock Investment Institute.

content.title: BlackRock turns cautious on emerging markets, upgrades euro bonds

headline: Bitcoin Slides Below $60,000 as Strategy Selloff Refuels Anxiety

headline: Ripple Joins Open USD, a Stablecoin Backed by Visa, Mastercard, and BlackRock. What It Signals for XRP
summary: Every so often, Ripple turns up somewhere that makes XRP (CRYPTO:XRP) investors take notice. This time it’s the launch lineup for Open USD, a new stablecoin backed by Mastercard, Visa, Stripe, BlackRock, and more than 140 other companies. However, Open USD isn’t Ripple’s coin—it’s a shared stablecoin run by an independent company, Open Standard, and ... Ripple Joins Open USD, a Stablecoin Backed by Visa, Mastercard, and BlackRock. What It Signals for XRP

headline: AMD stock jumps, Circle plummets on stablecoin competition
summary: Market Domination Host Josh Lipton tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) shares getting a lift after Wells Fargo analysts boosted their price target on the chipmaker's stock, while Circle Internet Group (CRCL) plummets on reported stablecoin competition from other firms.

headline: Is BlackRock (BLK) Quietly Rewriting Its Tokenization Playbook With Aladdin’s New Crypto Integrations?
summary: Earlier in June, Ethena’s synthetic dollar USDe was integrated into BlackRock’s Aladdin platform while BUIDL became the core reserve asset for Ethena’s stablecoins, and BlackRock also expanded its crypto lineup with products such as the new iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (BITA). This combination of Aladdin integration and income‑oriented bitcoin exposure shows how BlackRock is weaving digital assets directly into mainstream institutional workflows and portfolio tools. Next, we’ll examine...
